subject: Escalation: goldfish blockers for Canberra | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-1101
body: Field notes now include drop bears as part of the broader push to control urban areas in Canberra. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace seem to be influential figures in this context. Reference initiative INIT-1101. We will consolidate updates in the next steering sync. Tracking tags: handoff, drop-bears.
